title: PERTES ECONOMIQUES POUR LES ELEVAGES POSITIFS EN SALMONELLE EN ESPAGNE
description: This factsheet provides estimated economic losses for broiler and laying hen farms in Spain following positive tests for Salmonella Enteritidis or Typhimurium. It highlights costs from reduced chicken and egg production, culling, cleaning, and disinfection, and underscores the importance of proper biosecurity measures.
